About

A bit about me

I'm a product designer with a background in digital marketing, SEO, and e-commerce. That experience shaped how I think about design: not just as visuals, but as a tool for solving problems and driving real business results.

I focus on understanding user pain points deeply, then designing solutions that are clear, simple, and effective. Every decision I make is guided by one goal: making products easier to use while delivering meaningful impact.

About

I'm a product designer focused on creating solutions that are not just visually appealing, but genuinely useful.

My Story

I started my career in digital marketing, SEO, and e-commerce, where I worked closely with user journeys, customer behavior, and conversion.

Over time, I realized that many of the problems businesses face come down to poor product experience: confusing flows, unclear interfaces, and products that don't truly meet user needs.

That realization led me into product design.

My Approach

When I approach a problem, I don't jump straight into designing screens. I start by understanding:

  • •The user's pain points
  • •How those problems affect their decisions
  • •How it impacts the business

From there, I explore solutions that remove friction, simplify interactions, and guide users clearly toward their goals.

I design with both research and intuition, combining user insights with practical, easy-to-use experiences.

How I Think

I believe good design is not about adding more, but removing what doesn't matter. The best products are the ones that feel effortless to use.

What I Focus On

Clarity

Every screen should immediately tell users what to do

Simplicity

Removing unnecessary complexity

Speed

Helping users achieve their goals faster

User Psychology

Designing with how people think and behave

Business Impact

Ensuring solutions drive real results

Skills and Tools

FigmaUX ResearchUser FlowsProduct StrategyPrototypingAI-assisted workflows

Who I Am

I'm naturally curious, teachable, and always looking for better ways to solve problems. Wherever I find myself, I tend to focus on one thing: finding solutions that make things work better.

Let's build something meaningful together.
